title: TrustFolio
description: AI-powered price-comparison platform (web + Flutter app) that scrapes live product data from Amazon, Flipkart and Croma and recommends the best deal across platforms for a given budget.
points: Automated scraping pipeline (Python) pulling live price, availability and specs from Amazon, Flipkart and Croma via the Scrapdo API
OpenAI-powered analysis layer that compares listings across platforms and surfaces the single best offer for the user's budget and category
MERN backend and API serving both the trustfolio.in website and the Flutter mobile app from one data source
Freelance engagement — built and now maintain/optimize the scraping and recommendation pipeline for accuracy and API cost

title: SellWhatUMade
description: Multi-vendor marketplace enabling home-based artisans and small makers to list, showcase and sell handmade products.
points: Vendor onboarding and verification flow so artisans can start selling without friction
Product catalog with category and variant management for handmade, one-off inventory
End-to-end order management covering checkout, order status and fulfillment for buyers and sellers
Built and deployed the full stack solo — schema design through to production hosting

title: Gem Control
description: Portable jewellery shop management system covering billing, inventory and customer records.
points: Billing, inventory and customer record management built for single-shop retail use
Packaged to run directly from a USB drive with zero installation on the shop's PC
Designed offline-first so it works reliably without a stable internet connection
Traded typical web-app convenience for portability to match how the client actually works

title: GoEventify
description: Event vendor marketplace connecting customers with caterers, decorators, photographers and venues.
points: Vendor listings with search and filtering across categories (catering, decor, photography, venues)
Enquiry-to-booking flow that turns a vendor search into a direct booking conversation
Vendor-facing dashboard for managing listings and incoming enquiries
Architected for scale as more vendor categories and cities get added
